name: Dr Bian

skills.name: Malicious Practice
skills.description: Damage from skills and Basic Attacks places up to 5 marks on enemies each stack dealing damage over time.Chemist's Skill 2 and Ultimate grant up to 5 marks to himself and histeammates, continually restoring Health with each stack.

skills.name: Deadly Panacea
skills.description: Throws a vial of deadly poison at the target location, dealing damage overtime and slowing enemies within range.Deadly Panacea: Can store up to three vials.

skills.name: Fatal Diagnosis
skills.description: Launches a concoction in the target direction that deals damage to enemiesin its path and marks them.Restores Chemist and his allies' Health and marks them.

skills.name: Master of Life
skills.description: Damages enemies within range and heals teammatesEvery mark detonated will increase damage and healing.He recovers extra Health.

tips: Dr Bian is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 50.1% win rate and 0.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Scepter of Reverberation → Boots of the Arcane → Savant's Wrath → Insatiable Tome → Void Staff.
Run Saint for stats that match Dr Bian's Mage kit. Take Heal & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Deadly Panacea → Fatal Diagnosis → Master of Life → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
Teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
Dr Bian excels into Mai Shiranui, Diaochan. Avoid blind picking into Yang Jian without team peel.
Dr Bian sits at Tier B globally (50.1% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: Is Dr Bian good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Dr Bian is Tier B Mage with 50.1% win rate, 0.6% pick rate, and 0.1% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Dr Bian build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Scepter of Reverberation, Boots of the Arcane, Savant's Wrath, Insatiable Tome, Void Staff. Run Saint arcana with Heal & Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Dr Bian?
faqs.answer: Pick Yang Jian into Dr Bian. Deny Mid Lane resources early and force fights before Dr Bian completes core items. Dr Bian struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Dr Bian counter?
faqs.answer: Dr Bian is strong into Mai Shiranui, Diaochan according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Dr Bian when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Mid Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Dr Bian good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Dr Bian sits at Tier B globally (50.1% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: What lane should Dr Bian play?
faqs.answer: Dr Bian is tagged Mid Lane in Camp export (Mage). Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Dr Bian?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Saint arcana. Battle spell: Heal & Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Dr Bian or Daji — which is better?
faqs.answer: Dr Bian vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Daji wins 0.9% more often globally. Choose Dr Bian when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Dr Bian?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.1%). Focus bans on higher-tier Mage picks unless targeting a one-trick.
